hero.subHeadline: Say goodbye to WhatsApp chaos and long queues. Secure your community with a digital QR system built for Egypt & the GCC.

chaos.title: WhatsApp Chaos
chaos.description: Sending screenshots and typing names manually leads to human error and security gaps.

queues.title: Long Gate Queues
queues.description: Manual verification slows down entry, causing frustration for residents and guests.

blindspots.title: Security Blindspots
blindspots.description: No real-time logs mean you can't verify who entered, when, or who approved them.

qr.title: Dynamic QR Access
qr.description: Cryptographically signed QR codes that cannot be screenshotted or shared securely.

offline.title: Offline-First Scanning
offline.description: Gates operate flawlessly even when the internet goes down, syncing automatically when online.

analytics.title: Real-Time Intelligence
analytics.description: Monitor gate traffic, track peak hours, and export detailed audit logs instantly.

portal.title: Resident Portal
portal.description: Empower residents to manage their own guests with strict quota enforcement.

cta.headline: Ready to digitize your gate?
cta.subHeadline: Join the modern spaces upgrading their security infrastructure with GateFlow.
cta.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free starter plan available.

howItWorks.title: From QR to Gate in 3 Steps

step1.title: Create a Pass
step1.desc: Residents generate a secure QR code for their guest in seconds via the app or web portal.

step2.title: Guest Scans
step2.desc: The guest shows the QR at the gate. Guards scan it with our mobile app — works offline.

step3.title: You Get Notified
step3.desc: Receive instant notification when your guest arrives. Complete audit trail logged automatically.

palmHills.quote: GateFlow reduced our gate wait times by 60% and gave residents complete visibility over who visits their homes.
palmHills.author: Ahmed Hassan

eventManager.quote: We process 50,000+ visitor scans during our annual exhibitions. GateFlow handles it flawlessly.
eventManager.author: Sarah Al-Masri

security.quote: Finally, a system that gives us real-time audit trails. Security has never been this transparent.
security.author: Mohamed Khaled

securityGrid.subtitle: Security First
securityGrid.title: Zero-Trust Access Control
securityGrid.description: GateFlow is built on the same security principles used in global banking applications.

hmac.title: HMAC-SHA256 Signed QR
hmac.description: Every QR code is cryptographically signed. Reprints and fakes are rejected immediately — even offline.

rbac.title: Role-Based Access Control
rbac.description: Assign TENANT_ADMIN, TENANT_USER, and VISITOR roles. Every API action is scoped to the authenticated organization.

aes.title: AES-256 Offline Encryption
aes.description: Scans queued while offline are encrypted at rest with AES-256 + PBKDF2 key derivation. Zero data leaks.

audit.title: Full Audit Trail
audit.description: Every scan, override, and admin action is permanently logged with timestamps, gate IDs, and operator identity.

jwt.title: Zero-Knowledge Tokens
jwt.description: JWT access tokens rotate on use, with instant revocation on logout or detected anomaly.

monitoring.title: Real-time Monitoring
monitoring.description: Live dashboard with instant sync from all scanners. Monitor your perimeter security from anywhere.
